name: MCP-MultiServer-Interoperable-Agent2Agent-LangGraph-AI-System
description: This project demonstrates a decoupled real-time agent architecture that connects LangGraph agents to remote tools served by custom MCP (Modular Command Protocol) servers. The architecture enables a flexible and scalable multi-agent system where each tool can be hosted independently (via SSE or STDIO), offering modularity and cloud-deployable execut
